穿越到平行世界的肖兵，毅然选择投笔从戎，为国奉献！
凭借着顽强的毅力，成为了一名光荣的特种兵。
但荣誉满身的同时，也伤痕累累，身体濒临奔溃。
面对老上级的苦苦哀求，战友们的不舍。
军人的骄傲与尊严，让肖兵准备选择转业回家。
然而这时，系统觉醒，只要当总教官，身体便能恢复，而且还能变强。
女兵教官？狗都不……狗不当我当！
雷神：“有人空降总教官？老子不……我最服肖兵。”
叶寸心：“总教官最帅，最猛了！”
火凤凰：“怎么病秧子当总教官？啊……他太强了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/1f84819d8df155c700f78471768c6f59~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"辣椒特辣","author_id":"","book_id":"7547944737785777176","book_name":"你一伤残老兵，咋成魔鬼教官了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7141人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7547994765002804248","read_count":"7141","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"640496"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"304","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,特种兵,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1f84819d8df155c700f78471768c6f59~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779174009&x-signature=y17IMjwP6bsXladCseH3MyUUZJY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"101"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320150008B2B40BE96A963E5C68D3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_co
